headline: Coterra’s Rapid Q4 Revenue Growth Meets Ongoing Earnings And Dividend Questions
summary: Coterra Energy (NYSE:CTRA) reported the fastest Q4 revenue growth among its peer group. Despite that revenue performance, the company missed analysts' expectations for both EPS and EBITDA in the quarter. The results highlight a mix of growth opportunities and earnings pressures that investors are watching closely. Coterra Energy, an oil and gas producer with key positions in major US resource regions, sits at the intersection of shifting commodity demand and ongoing capital discipline...
